title: Creating Albums
drDigitalIntro: Albums organize your photos by topic. Create an album for a vacation, a holiday, or people. Drag photos into an album to organize them. Albums don't move the actual photos — they're just folders that group photos. You can have photos in multiple albums. Albums are great for creating collections to share with family or print.
drDigitalSuccess: You can organize photos into albums!
drDigitalHint: Albums are like folders for your photos.
